name: sidds-claude-plugins
description: Sidd's personal Claude Code marketplace: handcrafted plugins, productivity tools, and curated extensions.

plugins.name: research
plugins.description: Research-grade workflows. Six composable skills: ai-analysis (parity-enforcing AI comparisons with raw-call logging), citation-check (existence + metadata + line-by-line claim grounding), paper-summarizer (grounded structured summaries), replication-pack (deterministic experiment bundles), lit-review (multi-source verified search), pre-submission-check (final-pass audit).
